name: Short-Term Reversal (Intraday / Weekly Mean Reversion)
description: Exploits the empirical finding that stocks performing best (worst) over very short horizons (1-5 days) tend to reverse. Driven by bid-ask bounce, microstructure effects, and short-term liquidity provision dynamics. Buy recent losers, short recent winners.
core_logic: Signal = -sign(return_past_N_days). Entry when |return| > threshold AND RSI is in extreme zone. Exit after 1-5 days or at mean reversion.

risk.main_risk: High transaction costs; momentum continuation risk

key_papers: Short-Term Reversal Returns and Bid-Ask Spreads
